title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell to discuss how economic principles apply to AGI's development. They explore questions about optimal taxation and wealth redistribution from AI gains, inequality dynamics, and how countries outside the AI supply chain can benefit, challenging conventional intuitions about these economic outcomes.
